parameters.query:
SELECT
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_reply_to' THEN value END) AS email_reply_to
FROM public.global_settings
WHERE key IN ('n8n_base_url', 'email_reply_to');

SELECT id, name, refund_for, membership, reason, amount, refund, status, explanation,
       request_email_message_id, bank_details_message_id, treasury_email_message_id,
       paid_at, rejected_at, cancelled_at, notes, from_date, to_date, created_at, updated_at
FROM public.refunds
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 100;
